title: Vivarium
description: We took Vanilla+ too far! Atmospheric, optimized and fabric-based Modpack.
body:
# Vivarium & my new Modpack [Slightly Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/modpack/slightly-vanilla):

**Vivarium was a fun, little experiment. And I appreciate if you still like it.**

However I am currently working on a Modpack without vanilla-breaking features. 

It offers nearly every available performance mod here on Modrinth, better Atmosphere, Graphics and QoL improvements! And in general is better thought-out. :)

**Feel free to try it out: [Slightly Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/modpack/slightly-vanilla)**

## Vivarium Info
![Vivarium Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c82736fe351f1dd8881c27f8e0636c9a5cf3661c.jpeg)

_We took Vanilla+ too far! Atmospheric, optimized and fabric-based Modpack._

### Info
- Vivarium features lots of optimization mods, but also some gampeplay-changing and quality-of-life mods.

### Shader

- [MakeUp - Ultra Fast](https://modrinth.com/shader/makeup-ultra-fast-shaders) by javiergcim

### Resource Packs

- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) by FreshLX
- [Bushy Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bushy-leaves) by Awoolanche
